title: hibbertia juncea
intro: Hibbertia juncea, also known as the green guinea flower, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, with the leaves and flowers being used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Hibbertia juncea can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
